## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] `flake8 app/ core/ training/` passes
- [ ] `docker-compose build --no-cache api` clean
- [ ] `docker-compose up api` boots < 5s no errors
- [ ] Owner login 200
- [ ] Demo quota enforced
- [ ] Snapshot logs show `signals=100`
- [ ] No secrets in code

## Merge Checklist (reviewer fills this)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with target branch
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Issue numbers referenced and correct
- [ ] Code reviewed line by line
- [ ] Approved
